title: chamaeiris aurea
intro: Chamaeiris aurea, also known as the Golden Ragwort, is a flowering plant in the genus Chamaeiris, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Golden Ragwort include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Golden Ragwort typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or making a tincture by steeping the leaves in a solvent.
